steps.title: Specify the site characteristics
steps.content: The task asks for characteristics of the test site, so the relevant details are location, grassland type, climate, and rainfall. The notes identify a mesic grassland in the United States with a subtropical climate and year-round rain.

steps.title: Reject study-topic details
steps.content: Choice A reports the study's finding. Choice C identifies who conducted the study and when. Choice D describes what the researchers studied rather than where the test took place. The remaining choice lists the site characteristics requested by the question. The answer is B.
